name: Lekko
description: Dynamic configuration platform that turns functions in your codebase into remotely tunable values. Positioned as going beyond feature flags with FAANG-style config as code.

seo.title: Lekko — Feature Flags / Remote Config
seo.meta_description: Lekko: Dynamic configuration platform that turns functions in your codebase into remotely tunable values. Positioned as going beyond feature flags with FAANG-st

when_to_use: Turn code functions into remotely tunable configuration
Update business logic without full redeployment
Version-controlled config changes with audit trail

pros: Strongly typed dynamic config pushed to services
Good fit for complex tunables and experiments
cons: Novel model has a real learning curve
Pricing and maturity less proven than peers
review.verdict: Interesting pick for teams who need rich dynamic config, not just flags; evaluate vs building it yourself.
review.best_for: Platform teams needing FAANG-style remote, typed config
review.not_for: Small teams that only need on/off flags and rollouts

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
